subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Most Great Treasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو الکنز الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
